about: Curated intent-vocabulary source (ADR-0058): word → ordered parameter moves {op, input, direction, magnitude?, condition?} + antonym pointers, instrument-blind and registry-keyed. Edit rows here, then regenerate the rendered view: cargo run -p reuben-core --example gen_vocabulary. CI sweeps every move's op + input against the live operator registry and diffs the committed rendered view. STUB ROWS ONLY — the human-locked day-one content lands with reuben#463 (R6).
preamble: STUB — the edge-conduct preamble (ambiguous ask → act on the most likely reading and offer alternatives; unsatisfiable ask → nearest achievable move, state the gap) lands with the vocabulary content (ADR-0059 §2, reuben#463).

moves.condition: stub row — real conduct lands with the R6 content

fallback: STUB — the direction-only fallback block and its tie-breaker rule (table wins; unknown word → one conservative move, act-then-react) land with the vocabulary content (ADR-0058 §3, reuben#463).
